Active_visibility.description: Visibility scores for active badger sets (ranked 1–6 based on visibility to the nearest public right of way). These scores and the Unused_visibility scores pertain to different sets grouped by set type (active vs. unused).

Unused_visibility.description: Visibility scores for unused badger sets (ranked 1–6 based on visibility to the nearest public right of way). These scores and the Active_visibility scores pertain to different sets grouped by set type (active vs. unused).

Set_type.description: Grouping variable indicating whether the badger set is active (regularly used by a badger social group) or unused (no recent signs of badger activity).
